positive: A stylized, geometric illustration of a majestic wolf head roaring against a minimalist watercolor splatter background. The wolf should be rendered in sharp, contrasting lines, emphasizing clean silhouettes and tribal-inspired elements (like abstract dots and sharp angles). Use a limited, sophisticated color palette: deep indigo, earthy burnt orange, and charcoal black. Composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a chest print on apparel. The style should blend modern flat design with deep linework, achieving high visibility and contrast even when printed on fabric.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, gradient, photo, realism
